title: Application Control Bypass for Data Exfiltration, (Tue, Mar 31st)

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Application Control Bypass for Data Exfiltration, (Tue, Mar 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/31
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*04d.bin*'
            - '*data.zip*'
            - '*isc.sans.edu*'
            - '*pastebin.com*'
            - '*victim.tgz*'
            - '*victim.zip*'
            - '*wild.server.com*'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_Application_Control_Bypass_for_Data_Exfi {
    meta:
        description = "Application Control Bypass for Data Exfiltration, (Tue, Mar "
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "955587e24628dc46c85a7635cae888832113e86e6870cba0312591c44acf9833" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
